SEARCH
Package academy.tasks.checkoutstrategy.service

Interface CheckoutComponentFactory

public interface CheckoutComponentFactory
Creates discount and shipping strategies used by the checkout contract tests.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ShippingStrategy
    createFlatRateShippingStrategy(BigDecimal flatRate)
    Creates a shipping strategy that always charges the same amount.
    ShippingStrategy
    createFreeShippingOverThresholdStrategy(BigDecimal subtotalThreshold, BigDecimal standardShippingCost)
    Creates a shipping strategy that becomes free when subtotal reaches a threshold.
    DiscountStrategy
    createNoDiscountStrategy()
    Creates a strategy that never applies a discount.
    DiscountStrategy
    createPercentageDiscountStrategy(BigDecimal percentage)
    Creates a percentage-based discount strategy.
    ShippingStrategy
    createPerItemShippingStrategy(BigDecimal ratePerItem)
    Creates a shipping strategy that multiplies the rate by the total item quantity.
    DiscountStrategy
    createThresholdDiscountStrategy(BigDecimal subtotalThreshold, BigDecimal discountAmount)
    Creates a fixed discount that applies only when subtotal reaches a threshold.

  • Method Details

    • createNoDiscountStrategy

      DiscountStrategy createNoDiscountStrategy()
      Creates a strategy that never applies a discount.
      Returns:
      discount strategy that always returns zero

    • createPercentageDiscountStrategy

      DiscountStrategy createPercentageDiscountStrategy(BigDecimal percentage)
      Creates a percentage-based discount strategy.
      Parameters:
      percentage - percentage value such as 10.00 for ten percent
      Returns:
      configured percentage discount strategy

    • createThresholdDiscountStrategy

      DiscountStrategy createThresholdDiscountStrategy(BigDecimal subtotalThreshold, BigDecimal discountAmount)
      Creates a fixed discount that applies only when subtotal reaches a threshold.
      Parameters:
      subtotalThreshold - minimum subtotal required for the discount
      discountAmount - fixed discount amount to apply when the threshold is reached
      Returns:
      configured threshold discount strategy

    • createFlatRateShippingStrategy

      ShippingStrategy createFlatRateShippingStrategy(BigDecimal flatRate)
      Creates a shipping strategy that always charges the same amount.
      Parameters:
      flatRate - shipping cost charged for every checkout
      Returns:
      configured flat rate shipping strategy

    • createFreeShippingOverThresholdStrategy

      ShippingStrategy createFreeShippingOverThresholdStrategy(BigDecimal subtotalThreshold, BigDecimal standardShippingCost)
      Creates a shipping strategy that becomes free when subtotal reaches a threshold.
      Parameters:
      subtotalThreshold - minimum subtotal required for free shipping
      standardShippingCost - shipping cost charged below the threshold
      Returns:
      configured free-shipping threshold strategy

    • createPerItemShippingStrategy

      ShippingStrategy createPerItemShippingStrategy(BigDecimal ratePerItem)
      Creates a shipping strategy that multiplies the rate by the total item quantity.
      Parameters:
      ratePerItem - shipping cost for one ordered unit
      Returns:
      configured per-item shipping strategy
